what_was_done: Built TAP (Toroidal Agent Protocol) from scratch. Researched coding agents (Codex/Goose/Pi/herm), compared ACP. Designed+implemented 10 modules, 43 tests. Live-tested with real Claude Code. Decoupled into standalone package, published to github.com/OZmasterAI/tap-protocol. manage.sh compat bridge wired in.
known_issues: hasAvailableSubscription can go stale — check on resume if 1M context missing
Memory DB at 3076 entries — stale purge recommended
TAP persistent mode (long-lived Claude pipe) not yet implemented — only ephemeral works with real Claude
next_steps: TAP: implement persistent agent mode (long-lived claude subprocess with streaming input)
